channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Rights groups slam Israel's new law approving use of death penalty against Palestinians
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Palestinians convicted of lethal attacks face death penalty under new Israeli law
- Israeli MPs cheer death penalty for Palestinians accused of terrorism (VIDEO)
- UN condemns Israeli death penalty law for Palestinians as ‘particularly cruel’
- Palestinians in occupied West Bank protest Israel’s death penalty law
- An in-depth look at Israel's new death penalty law
- Palestinians horrified by Israel's new death penalty law
- Palestinians horrified by Israel’s new death penalty law
- Jailed Palestinians fear death by hanging without due process under new Israeli law
- Jailed Palestinians fear death by hanging without due process under new Israeli law
- Israel mandates death penalty for West Bank Palestinians who kill in terrorist acts
- Watch: UNRWA and EU condemn Israel death penalty law
- Israel approves death penalty for Palestinians
- ‘Discriminatory’ Israeli death penalty law sparks international criticism
- UN says Israel's death penalty law violates international law
- What’s Israel’s death penalty law that only applies to Palestinians?
- Palestinian official: Law allowing execution of prisoners ‘legalises genocide’ against our people
- Palestinians horrified by Israel's new death penalty law
- Horror and fear in West Bank as Israel approves hanging Palestinians convicted of murdering Israelis
- Horror and fear in West Bank as Israel approves hanging Palestinians convicted of murdering Israelis
- Hundreds rally in West Bank against Israeli death penalty for Palestinians
- What’s Israel’s death penalty law that only applies to Palestinians?
- US says respects Israel ‘right’ to legislate as death penalty bill for Palestinians widely condemned
- Hundreds rally in West Bank against Israeli death penalty for Palestinians
- EU: Israel's decision to pass death penalty law for Palestinians is "very concerning"
- Israel mandates death penalty exclusively for Palestinian convicted of 'nationalistic' murder; minister pops champagne
- Israel Passes Law to Hang Palestinians Convicted of Deadly Attacks
- EU: Israel's decision to pass death penalty law for Palestinians is "very concerning"
- EU: Israel's decision to pass death penalty law for Palestinians is "very concerning"
- Israel parliament approves death penalty bill for Palestinians convicted of deadly attacks
- Israel approves death penalty but only for Palestinians
- 'With God's help, we will kill our enemies': Israel introduces the death penalty for Palestinians accused of 'terrorist' murder
- US says respects Israel ‘right’ to determine its laws after death penalty for Palestinian attackers
- Outrage and condemnation over Israel’s death penalty law for Palestinians
- Israel passes death penalty law for Palestinians convicted of lethal attacks
- Israel approves death penalty for Palestinians convicted of deadly attacks
- Israel Passes Death Penalty Law for Terrorists - National Security Minister
- Israel parliament approves death penalty bill for Palestinians convicted of deadly attacks
- US says Israel free to set laws after death penalty act for Palestinians passed
- Israel passes law imposing death penalty for Palestinians convicted of terror attacks, US respects its 'right']]>

- Fire at petrochemical plant in Russia's Nizhnekamsk claims one live
- Explosion at Tatarstan Petrochemical Plant Kills 2, Injures Dozens
- 2 killed in Russia apartment fire]]>

item.title: Iran rejects ceasefire, demands complete end to hostilities across region
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran seeks no ceasefire but complete end to war: Foreign minister​​​​​​​
- Iran seeks complete end to Middle East war rather than ceasefire — top diplomat]]>

item.title: Israel to halt security procurement from 'hostile' France
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Israel halts defense acquisitions from France
- Israel cancels visit by French defense minister, report says]]>

item.title: Iran says it has ‘will’ to end war, as Trump zigzags on escalation
item.source: South China Morning Post (+6 other sources)
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran has 'necessary will' to end war but seeking guarantees, Pezeshkian tells EU
- Trump says war against Iran will not last ‘much longer’: Report
- 'Trump doesn't bluff': Pentagon chief warns Iran, says US wants deal but 'prepared to continue with bombs'
- Trump might end Iran war without significant changes to regime, Gulf states fear
- Trump again threatens widespread destruction in Iran if a deal is not reached ‘shortly’
- Gulf States pressure Trump to continue war with Iran until fall of Islamic regime - report]]>

item.title: US launches first overland B-52 bombers in operation against Iran: Top general

- Confident of Air Supremacy, U.S. Sends B-52 Bombers Over Iran
